# DevForge

> The cloud engineer's reference — GCP tutorials, Kubernetes guides, Terraform playbooks, and the browser tools to build alongside them.

DevForge is a free cloud engineering learning platform. All content is publicly accessible. No login required.

## What DevForge provides

- In-depth tutorials on GCP networking, Kubernetes, Terraform, CI/CD, monitoring, and DevOps
- 40+ browser-based developer tools that run entirely client-side (no data leaves the user's browser)
- Structured learning paths for cloud engineers at beginner, intermediate, and advanced levels

## Tutorials

Browse all tutorials: https://devforge.tools/tutorials/

Key topic areas:
- GCP Networking (VPC, subnets, firewall rules, Cloud NAT, DNS, routing, hybrid connectivity)
- GCP Security (IAM, KMS, Secret Manager, VPC Service Controls)
- GKE & Kubernetes (cluster setup, workloads, services, networking)
- Terraform (providers, modules, remote state, workspaces)
- CI/CD (Cloud Build, GitHub Actions, ArgoCD)
- Monitoring & Observability (Cloud Monitoring, Prometheus, Grafana)
- Cloudflare (Zero Trust, Workers, Tunnel)
- DevOps fundamentals, architecture patterns, Linux & CLI

## Developer Tools

Browse all tools: https://devforge.tools/tools/

Categories:
- Networking: https://devforge.tools/tools/networking/ — CIDR calculator, IPv4 subnet calculator, IPv4 range expander, IPv4 address converter, IPv6 ULA generator, MAC address lookup, MAC address generator, GCP virtual network planner
- Formatters: https://devforge.tools/tools/formatters/ — JSON, XML, SQL, HTML, JavaScript, CSS, Markdown
- Encoders & Decoders: https://devforge.tools/tools/encoders/ — Base64, URL, HTML entities, JWT decoder, hash generator, HMAC, password generator
- Generators: https://devforge.tools/tools/generators/ — UUID, cron expression builder, lorem ipsum, QR code
- Converters: https://devforge.tools/tools/converters/ — JSON↔CSV, JSON↔XML, YAML↔JSON, Unix timestamp, color converter, URL parser
- Validators: https://devforge.tools/tools/validators/ — HTML validator, XPath tester, regex tester, credit card validator

## Learning Paths

Browse all paths: https://devforge.tools/paths/

- GCP Networking Engineer: https://devforge.tools/paths/gcp-networking-engineer/
- Kubernetes Administrator: https://devforge.tools/paths/kubernetes-administrator/
- Terraform Practitioner: https://devforge.tools/paths/terraform-practitioner/
- DevOps Foundations: https://devforge.tools/paths/devops-foundations/
- GCP Security Engineer: https://devforge.tools/paths/gcp-security-engineer/

## Content Policy

All tutorials and tools are free to use. Content is written for practising cloud engineers, DevOps practitioners, and students learning cloud infrastructure. No paywall, no signup required.
